reviews.comment:
Un buen lugar para hacer una pequeña parada en el viaje, comprar algo, cargar combustible, entrar al baño o simplemente estirar las piernas a la sombra.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to make a quick stop on your trip, buy something, fill up with gas, use the bathroom, or simply stretch your legs in the shade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNElmY3FBRRAB

Accepts all payment methods except the YPF app

reviews.comment:
Muy amables los playeros. Me ayudaron a cambiar una de las luces del auto.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very friendly. They helped me change one of my car's headlights.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCdTVqemFREAE

reviews.comment:
Quisimos comprar algo para tomar mate, no tenían bizcochitos, no tenían facturas, no tenían galletas, no tenían nada... compre unas twistos, saque el mate y me dijeron que no se puede tomar mate en el local

(Translated by Google)
We wanted to buy something to drink mate with, they didn't have biscuits, they didn't have pastries, they didn't have cookies, they didn't have anything... I bought some Twistos, took out the mate gourd and they told me that you can't drink mate in the store
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMjQtUXRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Si bien es muy de campo, tenes los baños limpios y esta prolija

(Translated by Google)
Although it is very rural, the bathrooms are clean and tidy.

reviews.comment:
Solo estuve de paso, baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
I was just passing through, the bathrooms were clean.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre no anda nunca el posnet, en epoca del mundial no tienen televisor para ver los partidos en el año 2022 los empleados son mala onda. ACA VER UN DESASTRE ESTA ESTACION

(Translated by Google)
The POSnet never has a disaster. During the World Cup, they don't have a TV to watch the games. In 2022, the employees are rude. YOU CAN SEE THIS STATION AS A DISASTER.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCaHRDaHJBRRAB
